steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The claim is about the narrator's “strong emotional attachment to the surrounding forests.” We need a quotation where she expresses personal emotional feelings about the woods themselves.

steps.title: Find which quote reveals personal emotion
steps.content:
”My favourites” and “it makes my heart bleed to see one of those cut down”—these phrases directly convey personal affection and emotional pain.

The other three choices address parental neglect (A), describe the landscape (C), or mention forest activities (D)—none express personal emotion toward the forests.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
